name: AdGen Pro Lab
description: Upload a video or image ad and have the app create 10 creative variations of that ad that are likely to increase the click rate.

dialog.title: API Key Required
dialog.message:
This tool uses Google's advanced Gemini 1.5 Pro or Gemini 3 Pro models for video analysis and requires a valid API key.

**To connect your key:**
1. In the pop-up, select a Google Cloud project with billing enabled.
2. Ensure the **Vertex AI API** is enabled for your selected project.
3. Choose an existing API key or create a new one to proceed.
